_comment: Studie: Sportler-Silhouette (Neo-Sport) im Stil Klar & Klinisch. Ink-Charcoal + EIN Teal-Akzent. Gruener Standard-Chroma ist ok (kein Gruen im Motiv).
style: Clean Swiss-International clinical aesthetic: flat vector, crisp precise edges, generous negative space, calm and surgical, restrained palette of deep ink charcoal (#14201f) and a single cool teal accent (#0a6e66, lighter #5cb8af). No 3D, no heavy shading, no text, no background, single centered subject.

items.prompt: A bold dynamic sprinting runner in mid-stride, shown as a single clean solid silhouette in deep ink charcoal, with exactly one crisp diagonal speed-slash of cool teal cutting across behind the torso to suggest forward momentum. Athletic, confident, minimal, flat poster-clean shapes, single centered subject

A bold dynamic sprinting runner in mid-stride as a single clean solid silhouette filled entirely in calm cool teal, ultra-minimal, no extra accents, smooth confident athletic shape, single centered subject
